query:
ALTER TABLE api_call_logs 
ADD COLUMN isFlagged BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN flagReason ENUM('nsfw_content', 'violence', 'hate_speech', 'illegal_activity', 'self_harm', 'spam', 'harassment', 'other') NULL,
ADD COLUMN flagDetails TEXT NULL;
